description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large, floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels, especially prominent on the front and side facades. The house is surrounded by a low, solid perimeter wall and features a gated entryway with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. There are multiple outdoor spaces, including a covered patio and a balcony with glass railings, as well as a small pool or water feature visible on one side. The roof is flat and expansive, with minimal overhangs, and the overall design emphasizes openness and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, surrounded by a low wall and featuring a gated entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the gated entry with a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, balcony, and a small pool or water feature adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional large windows, a covered patio, and the continuation of the perimeter wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony, glass railings, and the paved outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a paved walkway, modern door, and minimal overhang, no porch or columns
